findings.check: ATLAS heartbeat vs live micro signals (composite, anomaly count, anomaly identities)
findings.detail: Heartbeat: health nominal, composite 0.673, 2 anomalies, GI 0.83 mode green. Production /api/signals/micro (~10:01Z): composite 0.677, 2 anomalies — same pair (GAIA/USGS Earthquake elevated; DAEDALUS-µ Self-ping HTTP 401 elevated). Count and character match; composite drift is negligible.

findings.check: Anomaly persistence and severity vs ATLAS snapshot
findings.detail: Both flagged anomalies remain present with severity still elevated (not resolved, not escalated to a higher label in the API). Treated as persistent operational signals rather than transient glitches.

source is "mock" — GI (0.83) and mode green are not backed by live integrity aggregation; treat score as indicative only. signals.freshness is 0.6 (degraded vs perfect freshness), consistent with non-live/stale inputs. kv: false.

findings.check: EVE global tension vs heartbeat and vs GI
findings.detail: Heartbeat file has no global_tension field. Production /api/eve/global-news: global_tension "low", source "mock", degraded=true (degradedReason: live feed returned no fresh items). No contradiction with green GI while EVE is on mock/low tension — world-state vs system-state disconnect not indicated.

Seismic elevated reflects USGS activity (geophysical). Self-ping 401 is app/auth infrastructure. EVE items are mock placeholders; no headline correlation required. Low tension with persistent infra/geo signals matches expectation.
VERCEL_TOKEN not available in this environment; cannot list deployments or verify READY/ERROR states or ignoreCommand behavior. Spot check: GET / and /terminal returned HTTP 200.

eve_correlation: EVE is mock and globally low tension; micro anomalies align with geophysical (seismic) and local infra (self-ping 401), not with placeholder geopolitical items.
recommendation: When credentials allow, confirm latest production deployment is READY and that bot commits are skipped via ignoreCommand. Prefer live integrity and EVE sources when feasible so GI and tension reflect real inputs; investigate intentional vs mistaken 401 on self-ping if that path should be unauthenticated for health checks.
